headline: Meta Declares War on the Cloud Giants, and Chip Stocks Pay the Price
summary: Meta's surprise move into cloud computing sent its shares up nearly 9% and rattled the neocloud upstarts, while chip stocks broadly retreated as Wall Street rotated into software. Michael Burry doubled down on his AI short, central bankers debated AI's uncertain economic impact at the ECB's Sintra forum, and oil eased further as US-Iran talks continued in Qatar.

headline: Why Appian (APPN) Is Up 14.1% After Sector Re-Rating And Expanded Deloitte AI Alliance – And What's Next
summary: In June, Guggenheim’s upgrade of large software peers like Salesforce and ServiceNow prompted a broad reassessment of software valuations, while Appian and Deloitte expanded their alliance to deliver AI-powered modernization for UK policing by unifying fragmented legacy systems. These developments highlight how sector sentiment can shift quickly on influential analyst views even as Appian’s fundamentals, including modest revenue growth and constrained free cash flow, continue to raise...

headline: Does Guggenheim’s Upgrade Reframe ServiceNow (NOW) as an AI Workflow Enabler Rather Than a Disruption Risk?
summary: In recent days, Guggenheim analyst John DiFucci upgraded ServiceNow from Neutral to Buy, arguing that AI-disruption fears had pushed software valuations too low and that the harshest scenarios were already reflected in prices. This upgrade, coming from a previously skeptical voice, has acted as a sector-wide signal that earlier pessimism toward enterprise SaaS may have been excessive, prompting investors to reassess ServiceNow’s role in AI-enabled workflows and security. We’ll now examine...

headline: NOW (PSE:NOW) Stock Looks Overvalued On Earnings Despite A 79% Fall
summary: NOW stock has a mixed record for shareholders, with the share price down about 79% over the past 5 years yet still screening as expensive on the current valuation checks. Over the past 5 years, NOW has delivered a share price decline of about 79%, which raises questions about how much long term value has been created for investors. For holders of NOW, the key support for any premium valuation may come from confidence in the company’s ability to translate its business model into durable cash...
